essay_profile.prompt:
What excites you about a career in engineering/technology? Why do you think your abilities and skills are a good fit for
Plaksha's B.Tech program?
essay_profile.text: On 25th February 2017, I watched Marvel Studios' Iron Man for the first time. Witnessing Jarvis, Tony Stark's AI assistant capable of executing complex tasks through voice commands, sparked my curiosity and determination to create something game-changing. I went on to research and realized humanity is still far from achieving transformative technologies that could redefine our reality. This realization sparked my journey into technology and innovation. My academic pursuits have focused on the theoretical applications of these fields, while my personal projects reflect my passion for bridging technology with everyday life. From a young age, I've been passionate about Mathematics, participating in interschool Math contests as early as grade 5. This journey has helped me cultivate strong logical thinking, and...
